title: Junior Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a Junior Data Engineer to join our team. As a Junior Data Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large-scale data systems. You will work closely with our data scientists and analysts to ensure that our data pipelines are efficient, scalable, and reliable.

Responsibilities:
- Design, build, and maintain ETL pipelines using Apache Spark and Kafka
- Develop and deploy data processing workflows using Airflow
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to understand data requirements
- Ensure data quality and integrity across all systems
- Work with cloud-based technologies such as AWS and Azure
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of our data engineering practices

Must-have skills:
- Python
- Apache Spark
- Kafka
- Airflow
- ETL Pipelines
- Docker
- AWS
- Azure

Nice to have:
- Experience with containerization using Kubernetes
- Familiarity with data warehousing concepts
- Knowledge of data governance principles
